mapper.sql: item_id, category_id, spe_id, itemName, price, brand, imageUrl, comments
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM Item i JOIN Filter f ON i.item_id = f.item_id WHERE i.spe_id=${spe_id} AND f.age = ${age} AND
f.stuff like '%' || ${s} || '%' AND
f.feature like '%' || ${f} || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE Item SET category_id=#{category_id}, spe_id=#{spe_id} itemName=#{ItemName}, price=#{price}, brand=#{brand}, imageUrl=#{imageUrl}, comments=#{comments}, WHERE item_id=#{item_id}
